grant_title: Worcester Affordable Housing Trust Fund Request for Proposals (RFP)
project_area: Development of new income-restricted affordable housing units, including property acquisition, site preparation, new construction, substantial rehabilitation, and predevelopment soft costs
demographic_requirements: Households earning up to 80% of Area Median Income (AMI), with priority for deeper affordability (30% and 60% AMI). Projects must ensure affordability in perpetuity and incorporate universal design.
eligibility_summary: Open to qualified housing developers proposing projects in Worcester, MA. Funding supports new affordable housing units for low- and moderate-income residents, with priority given to shovel-ready projects, deeper affordability, accessibility, and cost-effective leveraging of funds. Projects must comply with Community Preservation Act (M.G.L. Chapter 44B).
